title: Midnight Hash Gooey Treacle Bites
description: A sweet and crunchy Japanese-inspired treat made with midnight hash and gooey treacle. Perfect for a quick dessert or snack.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, mix together midnight hash and treacle until well combined.
Add polish and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
Use a cookie cutter or glass to cut out shapes.
Place shapes on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden.
While the shapes are baking, melt gooey in a small saucepan over low heat.
Remove the shapes from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes.
Drizzle melted gooey over the shapes and serve warm.
